name: every default catalog entry declares a non-empty applies_to list of stack tags
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/list-default-sources.sh" --format applies-to-check 2>out.txt && [ "$(grep -c 'applies_to=$' out.txt)" = "0" ] && [ "$(grep -c 'applies_to=' out.txt)" = "10" ] && echo ok 1>&2
